education_trend.help: Gender gap in literacy (male − female) has been narrowing steadily in Tamil Nadu. At 8.4 points it is below the national average of ~14 points.

workforce.help: LFPR = Labour Force Participation Rate. Urban women participation in TN lags rural, partly due to social norms and migration patterns.

maternal_mortality.help: Tamil Nadu achieved SDG MMR target of 70 by 2018-20. National average is still above target. MMR = deaths per 1,00,000 live births.
maternal_mortality.source: SRS Special Bulletin on MMR, RGI India

child_marriage_trend.help: Child marriage (women married before 18) has declined but remains above Kerala's 6.3%. Economic hardship and social norms are key drivers.

domestic_violence.help: % ever-married women aged 15-49 who experienced violence. TN below national average, but 1 in 4 women still report some form of violence.

schemes.name: Kalaignar Magalir Urimai Thogai
schemes.desc: ₹1,000/month direct cash transfer to women heads of household

schemes.name: Pudhumai Penn Scheme
schemes.desc: ₹1,000/month scholarship for govt school girl students in higher education

schemes.name: Cradle Baby Scheme
schemes.desc: Prevents female infanticide by accepting unwanted baby girls

schemes.name: Makkalai Thedi Maruthuvam
schemes.desc: Doorstep health services especially benefiting women

schemes.name: SHG TNSRLM
schemes.desc: Self-Help Groups promoting women's economic empowerment

scheme_beneficiaries.help: State government schemes targeting women's economic security and health outcomes.

women_in_politics.help: Local body representation boosted by 50% reservation for women in TN panchayats. State assembly representation is lower.
women_in_politics.source: State Election Commission TN 2021, Election Commission of India
